# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "identityName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name for the User-Assigned Managed Identity (which acts as the Service Principal)."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "subscriptionId": "[subscription().id]",
    "contributorRoleDefinitionId": "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-31",
      "name": "[parameters('identityName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('identityName'), variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId'))]",
      "scope": "[variables('subscriptionId')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName')), '2023-01-31').principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "identityResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName'))]"
    },
    "clientId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName')), '2023-01-31').clientId]"
    },
    "principalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName')), '2023-01-31').principalId]"
    }
  }
}
